description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in dark, overlapping shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from dark timber planks, giving the structure a robust and weathered appearance. The front facade features a small set of steps leading up to a single, centered doorway, but no windows are visible on any side. The roof extends slightly beyond the walls, providing a modest overhang for additional weather protection. The cabin sits directly on the ground without a visible foundation or porch. Its compact, utilitarian design suggests it is intended for basic shelter rather than decorative purposes.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, dark timber walls, and a single front door, lacking visible windows or a porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the steep gable roof, dark wooden facade, and a centered door with small steps leading up.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the overhanging shingled roof and solid timber wall, with no windows or doors visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the gable roof and solid wall, but no door or windows present.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the shingled roof and plain timber wall.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with steep pitch and overlapping dark shingles, moderate overhang
attribute_window_arrangement: No windows are visible on any side; the cabin appears to lack exterior windows entirely.
attribute_door_placement: A single exterior door is centered on the front facade, accessed by a small set of steps.
